title: Horton Solar Farm overhead line (CW51383), S37 consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  4 February 2025  Location   Horton Solar FarmLand East Of Rutton FarmRull LaneWhimpleEX5 2NX   Type of project / consent requested  Section 37 consent to install or keep installed an electric line. "
